title: PawHut Pet Stroller for Small Miniature Dogs Cats Foldable Travel Carriage with Wheels Zipper Entry Cup Holder Storage Basket Brown
features: Quality material: This dog stroller for small dogs features solid sprayed steel frame with high-quality 600D Oxford cloth to prevent claws and biting right through. The dog pram is durable for long-lasting use. A bottom basket is included for convenient storage, and cup holders and tray on the handle for water and treats.
Thoughtful design: This dog pushchair Features a zippered door on front and back for easy entry. And 3 breathable nets included for good air circulation & visibility and protect against bad insects.

Safety first: Front universal wheels, and rear directional wheels with brake lever included for easy parking, as well as a safety leash inside this dog buggy to keep your pet securely strapped in. 2 pairs of reflective strips on the front and back for attention.
Easy storage & transport: The frame of this cat stroller has a folding design, which means it's easy to store when not needed, and perfect for traveling by car.

Overall dimension: 75L x 45W x 97H cm, Inner space size: 55L x 32W x 52H cm. Folded dimension: 83L x 45W x 25H cm. Suitable for small and miniature dogs less than 35 cm in length and less than 10 kg in weight. Note: Please measure the body length of the your dog before purchasing.
